description: CompositionWhite sleeveless blouse, made of 68% cotton, 27% polyamide and 5% elastane,  full buttoned placket, and embroidered brand name next to the hemFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash inside out with like colours in warm water at 40 C Use mild detergentDo not scrub, bleach, tumble dry or wringDry inside out in shadeWarm iron inside outDo not iron directly on print/embroideryDo not dry cleanLook chic and stylish in this semi-formal white blouse from s.oliver. With a mix of polyamide and elastane, it is guaranteed to Fit you well. Team it with corduroys or jeans, and look like the smart chick that you are.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
